title: Kohandatud basseini ülevaade
description: Seadistage allpool oma kohandatud likviidsuse basseini jälgijad!
selectAssets: Valige paljude basseinide jälgimiseks kuni 5 vahetatavat vara!
trackerExists: Selle pealkirjaga jälgija on juba olemas.
deleteTracker: Kas olete kindel, et soovite selle jälgija kustutada?
hoverCreatingContent: Esitage oma uue basseini jälgija nimi.
hoverPoolDetailsContent: Valige allolevatest basseinidest jälgimiseks mõned basseinid.
noTrackersDescription: You haven't created any custom liquidity pool trackers. Add one to start tracking your favourite pools.
noPoolsToTrackDescription: No pools match your selected assets. Try choosing different assets or resetting the filters to see available pools.
nameRequired: Please provide a name for your tracker before continuing.
noPoolsSelected: Please select at least one pool to track.
